title: hydrangea aspera subsp. robusta
intro: Hydrangea aspera subsp. robusta, also known as the robust aspera hydrangea, is a plant species within the hydrangea family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The robust aspera hydrangea has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. In traditional medicine, the plant's leaves and flowers are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
